'''vodhadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:bubbleless|bubbleless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-dh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bubbleless|bubbleless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vodhadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vodhadithi|vodhadithi]] || [[word:vodhadiji|vodhadiji]] || [[word:vodhadishi|vodhadishi]] || [[word:vodhadiki|vodhadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vodhaduthuthu|vodhaduthuthu]] || [[word:vodhadujuju|vodhadujuju]] || [[word:vodhadushushu|vodhadushushu]] || [[word:vodhadukuku|vodhadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vodhaduthu|vodhaduthu]] || [[word:vodhaduju|vodhaduju]] || [[word:vodhadushu|vodhadushu]] || [[word:vodhaduku|vodhaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vodhadufthuf|vodhadufthuf]] || [[word:vodhadufjuf|vodhadufjuf]] || [[word:vodhadufshuf|vodhadufshuf]] || [[word:vodhadufkuf|vodhadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vodhadethe|vodhadethe]] || [[word:vodhadeje|vodhadeje]] || [[word:vodhadeshe|vodhadeshe]] || [[word:vodhadeke|vodhadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vodhadothotho|vodhadothotho]] || [[word:vodhadojojo|vodhadojojo]] || [[word:vodhadoshosho|vodhadoshosho]] || [[word:vodhadokoko|vodhadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vodhadotho|vodhadotho]] || [[word:vodhadojo|vodhadojo]] || [[word:vodhadosho|vodhadosho]] || [[word:vodhadoko|vodhadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vodhadofthof|vodhadofthof]] || [[word:vodhadofjof|vodhadofjof]] || [[word:vodhadofshof|vodhadofshof]] || [[word:vodhadofkof|vodhadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vodhadïfthïf|vodhadïfthïf]] || [[word:vodhadïfjïf|vodhadïfjïf]] || [[word:vodhadïfshïf|vodhadïfshïf]] || [[word:vodhadïfkïf|vodhadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vodhadïfthïfthïf|vodhadïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:vodhadïfjïfjïf|vodhadïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:vodhadïfshïfshïf|vodhadïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:vodhadïfkïfkïf|vodhadïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vodhadïfthïf|vodhadïfthïf]] || [[word:vodhadïfjïf|vodhadïfjïf]] || [[word:vodhadïfshïf|vodhadïfshïf]] || [[word:vodhadïfkïf|vodhadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vodhadïfthïf|vodhadïfthïf]] || [[word:vodhadïfjïf|vodhadïfjïf]] || [[word:vodhadïfshïf|vodhadïfshïf]] || [[word:vodhadïfkïf|vodhadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vodhadæthæ|vodhadæthæ]] || [[word:vodhadæjæ|vodhadæjæ]] || [[word:vodhadæshæ|vodhadæshæ]] || [[word:vodhadækæ|vodhadækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vodhadathatha|vodhadathatha]] || [[word:vodhadajaja|vodhadajaja]] || [[word:vodhadashasha|vodhadashasha]] || [[word:vodhadakaka|vodhadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vodhadatha|vodhadatha]] || [[word:vodhadaja|vodhadaja]] || [[word:vodhadasha|vodhadasha]] || [[word:vodhadaka|vodhadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vodhadafthaf|vodhadafthaf]] || [[word:vodhadafjaf|vodhadafjaf]] || [[word:vodhadafshaf|vodhadafshaf]] || [[word:vodhadafkaf|vodhadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vodhadasha|vodhadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vodhadshësha|vodhadshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vodhadrosha|vodhadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vodhadmusha|vodhadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vodhadyasha|vodhadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govodhadnkshësha|govodhadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govodhadnkrosha|govodhadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govodhadnkmusha|govodhadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govodhadnkyasha|govodhadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vodhadhadasha|vodhadhadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vodhadhadshësha|vodhadhadshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vodhadhadrosha|vodhadhadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vodhadhadmusha|vodhadhadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vodhadhadyasha|vodhadhadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govodhadhadnkshësha|govodhadhadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govodhadhadnkrosha|govodhadhadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govodhadhadnkmusha|govodhadhadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govodhadhadnkyasha|govodhadhadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vedhædasha|vedhædasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vedhædshësha|vedhædshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vedhædrosha|vedhædrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vedhædmusha|vedhædmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vedhædyasha|vedhædyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govedhædnkshësha|govedhædnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govedhædnkrosha|govedhædnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govedhædnkmusha|govedhædnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govedhædnkyasha|govedhædnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vodhfadasha|vodhfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vodhfadshësha|vodhfadshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vodhfadrosha|vodhfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vodhfadmusha|vodhfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vodhfadyasha|vodhfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govodhfadnkshësha|govodhfadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govodhfadnkrosha|govodhfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govodhfadnkmusha|govodhfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govodhfadnkyasha|govodhfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
